title: apios apios
intro: Apios apios, also known as wild potato or potato bean, is a perennial vine native to North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues, and has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Apios apios include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Apios apios can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
